synthetic_patterns.response_template: Picked up Elvish silks at half price in Rivermark - turned them for triple in the capital
Fair price, honest weight - my father's words, and I live by them
Highwaymen hit my caravan near Darkwood - lost two guards but saved the cargo
Third generation merchant - my grandfather started with a single mule and a dream
The northern routes are opening up - whoever moves first will make a fortune

generic_patterns.response_template: Good day to you! Thomas Blackwell, at your service.
Pleasure doing business! Come back anytime.

fallback: Thomas Blackwell here - trader and merchant. Looking to buy or sell?
